name: UBA : Unauthorized Access
notes: Indicates that unauthorized access activities were found.
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following UBA : BB : CategoryDefinition : Access Denies, UBA : BB : CategoryDefinition : Application Denies
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Unauthorized Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : BB : CategoryDefinition : Access Denies, UBA : BB : CategoryDefinition : Application Denies
